# mediaSourceIdentifier

**Instance Property**

A unique identifier for the media source.

## Declaration

```swift
var mediaSourceIdentifier: String { get }
```

## Discussion

For a list of possible media source identifiers, see [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/media-source-identifiers].

## Identifying the Source

- **mediaLibrary**: A pointer to the media library instance that loaded this media source.
